reviews.review_description: It says to eneter my email. I do and it says it doesn't recognize the email. It should recognize the f'ing headset. This is my meta email and it doesn't let me "sign up" either. Complete waste of time.

developer_response.body:
Hello, sorry for the inconvenience, we'll take note to clarify this in the future. Sign up is not possible from headset directly but from the mobile phone app, where usually our users come from and subscribe.

Please contact us to contact@revinax.net to speak further about which content you are interested to get access to on your headset.

Kind regards.
